summary: Added HiDPI/retina canvas scaling to fix blurry rendering on modern displays. Created setupHiDPICanvas() utility that handles DPR-aware canvas sizing with ctx.scale(). Applied to all three canvases (gameCanvas 300x600, nextPieceCanvas 120x120, bgCanvas fullscreen). Added matchMedia listener for DPR changes when dragging between displays. Updated bgCanvas animation to use CSS-pixel coordinates consistently. Verified all game logic and touch input are DPR-independent.
